p5_candidate.answer: less water per tablespoon of coffee
p5_candidate.reasoning_summary: The user previously used 1 tbsp per 6 oz water (Feb 11, 2023) and later switched to 1 tbsp per 5 oz water (Jun 30, 2023). Since 5 oz is less water than 6 oz for the same amount of coffee, the ratio has less water per tablespoon (more concentrated). The candidate answer incorrectly stated 'more water per tablespoon'.
